packApplicability.reason: Spring Security usage was detected. This pack targets Spring Security 5.x to 6.x readiness.

productionFindings.title: Spring Security 5.8.x detected
productionFindings.recommendation: Plan Spring Security 6 authorization and configuration validation.

productionFindings.title: Legacy Spring Security matcher API
productionFindings.recommendation: Review matcher semantics before requestMatchers migration.

productionFindings.title: javax namespace usage detected
productionFindings.recommendation: Plan Jakarta namespace alignment before Spring Security 6 validation.

evidence.name: OpenRewrite dry-run readiness
evidence.note: OpenRewrite execution is available through transform --engine openrewrite when Maven or Gradle execution is available.

nextActions.title: Plan javax to Jakarta namespace migration
nextActions.reason: Modern Spring Boot and Hibernate migration paths require Jakarta namespace readiness.

nextActions.title: Review Spring Security 6 configuration risks
nextActions.reason: Spring Security 6 readiness depends on explicit review of removed configuration adapters, matcher API changes, authorization DSL changes, and method security annotations.
